title: Finite Entropy Information Gain

solver_reuse.target: finite entropy bad weighted-entropy QF_LRA/Farkas regression seed
solver_reuse.pressure: Exact finite dyadic-entropy replay computes color-split weighted entropy 1/2 from eight classified rows whose node proportions all lie in {0, 1/2, 1}, while a malformed row claims 3/4, isolating a compact scalar Farkas conflict.
solver_reuse.next_step: Promote additional entropy rows only when they add distinct non-dyadic exact-log, log-loss, mutual-information, multiclass, threshold, pruning, or numerical-honesty pressure; keep generalization, greedy-optimality, and general-logarithm entropy claims in theorem or statistical-inference lanes.

graduation_criteria: Encode the fixed finite classifier table, feature domains, class totals, dyadic node entropies, candidate split entropies, and information-gain comparison as deterministic exact-rational replay obligations over nodes whose class proportions lie in {0, 1/2, 1}.
Route the false weighted-entropy claim through a source-linked QF_LRA artifact and checked Farkas evidence after exact replay computes the conflicting split equation.
Expose the pack through statistics, probability, discrete/counting, decision-tree, exact-vs-floating, and learner-query surfaces.

Keep general-logarithm entropy, log-loss splitting, mutual information, greedy-tree optimality, pruning, threshold policy, statistical generalization, continuous feature thresholds, and floating-point tree-training behavior marked theorem, statistical-inference, or numerical-honesty horizon.
